title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BankBazaar Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
